stopConditions: Two consecutive tool failures on the same operation
Implementation diverges from compiled blueprint intent

Failure mode reached: forceClean is false and TsBuildInfo state is current — clean step should be skipped but is invoked erroneously; filesystem delete fails due to file lock — another process (e.g., watch mode tsc, running server) holds a file in distDir; distDir still contains .tsbuildinfo after delete attempt — partial clean due to permission error
requiredEvidence: no .js, .d.ts, or .tsbuildinfo files exist under any WorkspacePackage.distDir; DistArtifact state is absent for all packages

tsc process exits with code 0; for each WorkspacePackage, DistArtifact.jsFiles is non-empty, DistArtifact.declarationFiles is non-empty, TsBuildInfo.filePath exists with updated lastBuildTimestamp; DistArtifact state is complete for all packages
